'''âb-ng-m''' ('''kabangam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhetorize|rhetorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhetorize|rhetorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-ng-m
|-
! Lemma
| kabangam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibangam|thibangam]] || [[word:jibangam|jibangam]] || [[word:shibangam|shibangam]] || [[word:kibangam|kibangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubangam|thuthubangam]] || [[word:jujubangam|jujubangam]] || [[word:shushubangam|shushubangam]] || [[word:kukubangam|kukubangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubangam|thubangam]] || [[word:jubangam|jubangam]] || [[word:shubangam|shubangam]] || [[word:kubangam|kubangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubangam|thubangam]] || [[word:jubangam|jubangam]] || [[word:shubangam|shubangam]] || [[word:kubangam|kubangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebangam|thebangam]] || [[word:jebangam|jebangam]] || [[word:shebangam|shebangam]] || [[word:kebangam|kebangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobangam|thothobangam]] || [[word:jojobangam|jojobangam]] || [[word:shoshobangam|shoshobangam]] || [[word:kokobangam|kokobangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobangam|thobangam]] || [[word:jobangam|jobangam]] || [[word:shobangam|shobangam]] || [[word:kobangam|kobangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobangam|thobangam]] || [[word:jobangam|jobangam]] || [[word:shobangam|shobangam]] || [[word:kobangam|kobangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbangam|thĂŠbangam]] || [[word:jĂŠbangam|jĂŠbangam]] || [[word:shĂŠbangam|shĂŠbangam]] || [[word:kĂŠbangam|kĂŠbangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabangam|thathabangam]] || [[word:jajabangam|jajabangam]] || [[word:shashabangam|shashabangam]] || [[word:kakabangam|kakabangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabangam|thabangam]] || [[word:jabangam|jabangam]] || [[word:shabangam|shabangam]] || [[word:kabangam|kabangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabangam|thabangam]] || [[word:jabangam|jabangam]] || [[word:shabangam|shabangam]] || [[word:kabangam|kabangam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabangam|shabangam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabangam|goshabangam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabangam|gokishabangam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabangamnĂŒ|shabangamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabangamnknĂŒ|goshabangamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangamnĂŒ|gokishabangamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabangamshĂ«|shabangamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabangamnkshĂ«|goshabangamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabangamshĂ«|gokishabangamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangamro|shabangamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangamnkro|goshabangamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangamro|gokishabangamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangamu|shabangamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangamnkmu|goshabangamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangamu|gokishabangamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabangamsher|shabangamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabangamnksher|goshabangamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabangamsher|gokishabangamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabangamng|shabangamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabangamnkng|goshabangamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabangamng|gokishabangamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabangamya|shabangamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabangamnkya|goshabangamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabangamya|gokishabangamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabangamyam|shabangamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabangamnkyam|goshabangamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabangamyam|gokishabangamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangamnĂŒshĂ«|shabangamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabangamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabangamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangamnĂŒro|shabangamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangamnknĂŒro|goshabangamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangamnĂŒro|gokishabangamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangamnĂŒmu|shabangamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangamnknĂŒmu|goshabangamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangamnĂŒmu|gokishabangamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangamshĂ«nĂŒ|shabangamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabangamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabangamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangamshĂ«ro|shabangamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangamnkshĂ«ro|goshabangamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangamshĂ«ro|gokishabangamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangamshĂ«mu|shabangamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangamnkshĂ«mu|goshabangamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangamshĂ«mu|gokishabangamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangamronĂŒ|shabangamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangamnkronĂŒ|goshabangamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangamronĂŒ|gokishabangamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangamroshĂ«|shabangamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangamnkroshĂ«|goshabangamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangamroshĂ«|gokishabangamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangamromu|shabangamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangamnkromu|goshabangamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangamromu|gokishabangamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangamunĂŒ|shabangamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangamnkmunĂŒ|goshabangamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangamunĂŒ|gokishabangamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangamushĂ«|shabangamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangamnkmushĂ«|goshabangamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangamushĂ«|gokishabangamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangamuro|shabangamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangamnkmuro|goshabangamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangamuro|gokishabangamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
